siteMetadata.description: Hello, I am a Freelance Web Developer based in Toronto, Canada with over 3 years of industry experience. I offer a complete range of services including graphic design, web development and hosting, and am proficient in JavaScript (React), CSS, and HTML. Please feel free to contact me to discuss how I can help you with your next project.
